return(function(...)local x,m in ipairs({{899704-899703,43794-43521};{-260030-(-260031);-709073-(-709196)};{143811+-143687,-827029-(-827302)}})do while m[886483-886482]<m[-410666+410668]do function x(x)return I[x+(-88547-(-93495))]end do local x=string.sub local m=math.floor local J=string.char local end m=#L return J(f)end,{},function(I,x)local J=Z(x)local z=function()return m(I,{},x,J)end return z end,function(I,x)local J=Z(x)local z=function(z,M,L,s)return m(I,{z;M,L,s},x,J)end return z end,function(I)for x=626172-626171,#I,1039959+-1039958 do E[I[x]]=(338377-338376)+E[I[x]]end if z then local m=z(true)local
